§6Watz Power Plant§f

§aPost-RBMK fission reactor — expensive, low power, but essential for poisonous mud production!§f

The §bWatz Power Plant§f is a fission-based nuclear reactor that sits beyond the RBMK and PWR in progression but before fusion. Its primary purpose is producing §bPoisonous Mud§f — essential for CMB Steel.

§c⚠ Disappointing Power§f: The Watz produces barely §e5 MHE/s§f even on the best fuel — it's built for byproducts, not power.

§6Construction§f:
§b• 1×§f Watz Core Component
§b• 26×§f Supercoolers
§b• 36×§f Reaction Chambers
§b• 48×§f Stability Elements
§b• 1×§f Pneumatic Rivet Gun (4 High-Speed Steel Bolts per block)
§b• 192×§f High-Speed Steel Bolts
§b• 1×§f Pressure Pump (placed on top)

§6Overview§f: Similar to ZIRNOX — a single assembled unit, not modular. Requires pressure pump on top, redstone signal to operate, and fuel pellets in the GUI. Does not boil water directly — needs separate heat exchanger + boiler setup. Depletes fuel §eextremely slowly§f. Individual Watz units can be stacked vertically and controlled by a single pump.

§6Fuels§f: MEU, MEP, HEN, and schrabidium-based. Absorber pellets can boost poisonous mud production.

§eSee Watz Operation & Waste quest for GUI, fuel reprocessing, meltdown details, and pros/cons!
